output.sparql:
PREFIX ps: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/>
PREFIX p: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX pq: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/qualifier/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
SELECT ?winner ?winnerLabel WHERE {
  ?ceremony wdt:P166 wd:Q1137234 ; wdt:P571 ?date .
  ?ceremony p:P1326 [ ps:P1326 ?winner ; pq:P1619 ?category ] .
  ?category rdfs:label "Entertainer of the Year" @en .
  ?winner rdfs:label ?winnerLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?winnerLabel) = 'en')
  .
}
ORDER BY DESC(?date)
LIMIT 1

output.formatted:
Luke Combs

SPARQL query over wikidata:
```sparql
PREFIX ps: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/>
PREFIX p: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX pq: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/qualifier/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
SELECT ?winner ?winnerLabel WHERE {
  ?ceremony wdt:P166 wd:Q1137234 ; wdt:P571 ?date .
  ?ceremony p:P1326 [ ps:P1326 ?winner ; pq:P1619 ?category ] .
  ?category rdfs:label "Entertainer of the Year" @en .
  ?winner rdfs:label ?winnerLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?winnerLabel) = 'en')
  .
}
ORDER BY DESC(?date)
LIMIT 1
```

- award received (wd:P166 as wdt), also known as "award", "awarded", "awards", "awards received", "award won", etc.:
